nasb.text: You shall gird them with sashes, Aaron and his sons, and bind caps on them, and they shall have the priesthood by a perpetual statute. So you shall ordain Aaron and his sons.

esv.text: and you shall gird Aaron and his sons with sashes and bind caps on them. And the priesthood shall be theirs by a statute forever. Thus you shall ordain Aaron and his sons.

cnv.text: 要給亞倫和他兒子束上腰帶，包上頭巾；這樣，他們就按永遠的定例，得了祭司的職分。你又要把亞倫和他兒子們分別為聖。

ccb.text: 为他们束上腰带，戴上帽子，他们就按永远的条例得到祭司的职分。你要这样把圣职授予他们。
